subject: 20% tariff on Indian pharmaceutical chemicals
claim_text: The US proposed a 20% tariff on pharmaceutical chemicals and active ingredients from India.

subject: 45% tariff on Indian plastic and rubber imports
claim_text: Executive order signed placing 45% tariff on plastic and rubber chemical imports from India.

subject: China tariff pause on garments suspended
claim_text: The 90-day pause on Chinese garment tariffs has been suspended pending review.

subject: Mexico auto tariff increase to 30% reported
claim_text: Sources report a planned increase to 30% on Mexican automobile parts imports.

subject: New 145% tariff on Chinese textile goods
claim_text: Executive Order signed imposing 145% tariff on Chinese textile and fabric imports.

subject: Bangladesh garment exports face new 15% tariff
claim_text: New 15% tariff on garment and fabric exports from Bangladesh signed into law.
